title: vittaria guineensis var. orientalis
intro: Vittaria guineensis var. orientalis, also known as the Oriental Chain Fern or Vittaria fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Vittariaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Vittaria guineensis var. orientalis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparation of this plant can be taken in the form of tea, infusion, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
